description_long: This refrigerator features a modern, boxy design with a matte dark gray finish and subtle cloudy texturing across its surface. The front is divided into two main sections: an upper compartment with double doors and a lower pull-out freezer drawer. On the left side of the upper doors, there is a rectangular water and ice dispenser, while the right side features a blue-tinted digital control panel with a wavy pattern. The sides and back are plain, lacking any visible handles, vents, or additional features. The overall appearance suggests a contemporary appliance suitable for urban kitchens, garages, or communal spaces.
description: A modern, matte dark gray refrigerator with a water/ice dispenser and blue digital control panel on the front, featuring a lower freezer drawer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double doors, water/ice dispenser, blue digital control panel, and lower freezer drawer.
description_view_1: Left side view, plain and featureless with no visible handles or panels.
description_view_2: Rear view, completely flat and unadorned with a uniform dark gray finish.
description_view_3: Right side view, also plain and featureless like the left side.
attribute_door_handle_style: Integrated vertical handles, flush with the door surface, running parallel to the door edges.
